name: First State Bank
description_short: First State Bank Valliant, OK — FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and mobile banking services across Oklahoma locations in ...
description_long:
First State Bank is a regional community bank operating in southeastern Oklahoma with branches in Valliant, Idabel, and Hochatown. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing consumers with deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a range of consumer banking products including a Kasasa Cash Back checking account that pays 1.75% cash back and refunds ATM withdrawal fees, online banking with enrollment options, mobile deposit capture functionality, and a mobile app for account management on tablets and mobile devices. They also provide personal and business loans, debit card alert services, and a customer switch kit to facilitate account transfers from other institutions.

First State Bank distinguishes itself through its focus on personalized customer service with multiple local branch locations and a dedicated tele-bank line. They offer practical features like mobile check deposit, ATM fee reimbursement through their cash back checking product, and debit card monitoring alerts to help customers stay engaged with their accounts.

As a small regional bank, First State Bank is best suited for customers in its operational footprint who prefer local banking relationships over large national institutions. The primary limitation is geographic scope—they appear to serve only three towns in Oklahoma—making this option unavailable for consumers outside this region. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Kasasa Cash Back checking with 1.75% cash back rewards
Online banking enrollment and account management
Mobile app with check deposit capture
Mobile fund transfers and balance inquiries
Business loans for entrepreneurs and small business owners
Account switch kit for transferring from competitor banks
Lost or stolen debit/ATM card reporting (866-657-0647)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Kasasa Cash Back checking account pays 1.75% cash back with ATM fee refunds
Mobile check deposit capture available through mobile app
Free mobile app for deposits, transfers, and balance checks
Multiple local branch locations with dedicated tele-bank line for customer service
FSB Switch Kit available to simplify account transfers from competitors
Debit card alerts to monitor account activity in real-time
cons: Limited geographic availability restricted to three small Oklahoma towns (Valliant, Idabel, Hochatown)
No specific information provided about savings account rates, CD rates, or loan APR ranges
Limited online presence with minimal detail about loan qualification requirements or terms
best_for: Residents of Valliant, Idabel, or Hochatown, Oklahoma seeking local banking relationships
Consumers prioritizing FDIC insurance protection and community bank customer service
Small business owners in southeastern Oklahoma needing local lending relationships
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for consumers in southeastern Oklahoma (Valliant, Idabel, Hochatown area) who value FDIC-insured deposits, local relationships, and cash back checking rewards. The primary caveat is that this bank's service area is geographically limited to three small towns, making it inaccessible for most consumers outside this region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
